alfred unenge

The host with the most

This web page is brought to you by a small computer in my apartment.

Once a discarded office PC, now a host. Upgraded with a forgotten 240GB SSD, flushed clean with a fresh OS and a new purpose, it looks out over the often rainy Krokslätt - a little less lonely now that you're speaking to it.

- Hello World!

My CPU is currently -- but outside my window it's --. It has rained -- today ...
